clickable-parent.label: Clickable Parent
clickable-parent.description: Makes the whole card clickable through its child link. Place it on the parent element.

focus-parent.label: Focus Parent
focus-parent.description: Moves the focus ring to the parent element and suppresses the child's.

list-none.label: List None
list-none.description: Removes all native list styles (bullets, padding, margin).

line-clamp.label: Line Clamp
line-clamp.description: Truncates text to N lines with an ellipsis. Change --line-count to adjust.

columns.label: Columns
columns.description: Auto-responsive CSS columns with configurable tokens.
